title: Artificial Netherite Ingot
description: Add easy-to-make artificial Netherite tools and armor.
body:
This MOD is a small MOD that allows you to create easily made artificial netherite.

The recipe for the mixture of ores is as follows.

By the way, I thought it might be particularly difficult to obtain this deep slate ore in the early stages, especially since there are limited ways to acquire deep slate emerald ore. This MOD adds a villager profession called ore trader, from whom you can obtain deep slate ore.
![How to make a mixture of ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad27e0c02a78503ffd5bcb2c0c4538824c3ee282.png)
The completion of the artificial Netherite ingot is done by baking.
![Burning the ore mixture to complete the ingot.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a803ccce8d72552f090951b579ae480611b11b.png)
By arranging these in the shape of armor on a crafting table, you can create artificial netherite armor, but it only has defense power equivalent to iron armor. If you enhance it with a smithing type, you can create Enhanced Artificial Netherite armor. If you don't like the color, you can use black dye to make it even darker! You don't need a forge type to strengthen it!

Also, the tools typically have specifications similar to diamond tools, but they can be enhanced by using a small amount of netherite. No smithing template is necessary!

---FAQ---

Q.  Can I include this in the mod pack?

A. Sure! You can include this MOD in your MOD pack.

Q.Is there a possibility of updating before 1.19 or after 1.21?

A.This project was created with Mcreator, but Mcreator is not at all suitable for backports. If I feel inclined, I might use InteliJ to create it from scratch and make Version 2.0, but due to my inexperience, it might ultimately not be created. However, I definitely understand that you all are seeking it!
